title: Fix MongoDB Query Projection to Handle Optional Fields

statement.markdown: Write a function that takes a MongoDB query and a list of fields to include in the projection. The function should return the MongoDB query with the projection applied. If a field is optional and its value is null, it should not be included in the projection. If a field is not optional and its value is not null, it should be included in the projection. The function should handle cases where the query has both required and optional fields.
statement.inputFormat: MongoDB query as a JSON object, list of fields to include in the projection
statement.outputFormat: The MongoDB query with the projection applied as a JSON object
statement.notes: The function should handle cases where the query has both required and optional fields.

constraints.description: Number of fields in the query
Number of fields to include in the projection

examples.explanation: The projection includes only the required fields with non-null values
The projection includes only the required fields with non-null values

hints.text: Use the MongoDB $projection operator to filter out optional fields with null values

editorial.title: Fix MongoDB Query Projection to Handle Optional Fields
editorial.intuition: Use the MongoDB $projection operator to filter out optional fields with null values
editorial.bruteForce: Use a nested loop to check each field in the query and apply the projection
editorial.betterSolution: Use the MongoDB $projection operator to filter out optional fields with null values
editorial.optimalSolution: Use the MongoDB $projection operator to filter out optional fields with null values
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The function returns the MongoDB query with the projection applied correctly
editorial.dryRun: Apply the projection to the query and verify that it returns the expected result
commonMistakes: Failing to handle optional fields with null values
Including required fields with null values in the projection

functionSignature.python:
def projectQuery(self, query, fields):
  return query;
